response.step_by_step_log: I watched the video and identified the performers as the four members of Hololive 5th Generation (NePoLaBo). The video consists of a 3D live performance followed by a long credit roll for the event '#ねぽらぼ5周年祭3Dライブ'. I attempted to find the title of the opening song using the event name and performers via a web search, but no definitive title or lyrics were found, as it is likely an original song for the event. Therefore, the lyrics fields are set to null.
response.global_summary: The video shows a 3D live performance by the Hololive 5th Generation group, also known as 'NePoLaBo' (Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, Yukihana Lamy, and Omaru Polka), followed by a credit sequence. The performance segment features all four members singing a collaborative song. The credit sequence lists production staff for the live event.

scenes.description: The four VTubers (Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, Yukihana Lamy, and Omaru Polka) are on a 3D stage in front of an audience, performing a song together. Lyrics are displayed on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, Yukihana Lamy, Omaru Polka

scenes.description: The video continues with a credit roll, displaying the production staff involved in the 'NePoLaBo 5th Anniversary 3D Live'.
